arts.ttl: Celtic vs Young Boys: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: And 67 Hail Hail has details below for fans of everything you need to know about Celtic vs Young Boys including the kick-off time, TV channel, team news and the officials appointed. Celtic take on Young Boys in the Champions League this evening knowing three points is an absolute must.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor reveals the Celtic missing link as captain rails against the 'atmosphere' plaudits
arts.sum: The Hoops midfielder has won just about everything going but there’s something big missing from his CV

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Young Boys: Preview, predictions and lineup
arts.sum: Previewing Celtic's Champions League fixture against Swiss side Young Boys. Preview includes team news, TV information, and a score prediction.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor ready to rip up Celtic Champions League nearly tag as skipper says 'no more hard luck stories'
arts.sum: The Hoops captain is sick of hard luck tales against Europe's elite as he looks to seal a knockout spot with a game to spare

arts.ttl: Inside Celtic star Nicolas Kuhn's kind-hearted Kilmarnock gesture
arts.sum: Inside Celtic star Nicolas Kuhn's kind-hearted Kilmarnock gesture.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes brutal Aston Villa admission ahead of Celtic showdown as Spaniard fumes at Champions League defeat
arts.sum: A 1-0 defeat to Monaco on Thursday night means the Villians will need to beat the Hoops next week and get some help from results elsewhere to claim a top eight finish

arts.ttl: 'You have doubts...' Ally McCoist reacts to Gabby Agbonlahor's Aston Villa-Celtic claim
arts.sum: But Aston Villa themselves have aspirations of their own and that’s booking a possible top-eight spot, so by the time both teams meet, there could still be a lot to play for. Ally McCoist tells Gabby Agbonlahor he has ‘doubts’ about Aston Villa’s clash against Celtic

arts.ttl: Celtic told key player will end career in Glasgow and won't reunite with Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: Celtic told Callum McGregor won’t reunite with Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham “I can’t see Callum McGregor leaving Celtic,” responded Ferguson on Ange possibly taking him on.

arts.ttl: Why UEFA sent Celtic hero Kyogo Furuhashi a class message just days before big Champions League fixture
arts.sum: Indeed, the goal the Hoops striker scored was in Celtic’s 2-2 draw with Atletico Madrid where Brendan Rodgers’ side was unlucky not to beat the La Liga club. Kyogo’s other two goals in the Champions League came in Celtic’s 5-1 thrashing of Slovan Bratislava this season and, of course, in last season’s defeat against Lazio at Celtic Park .

arts.ttl: Every word Callum McGregor said before Celtic vs Young Boys as captain demands no 'nearly team' tag
arts.sum: In the profile of the side, there’s so much speed and quality that in those moments when we turn the ball over we can go forward with one pass and be a real threat in the game as well so as well as our normal football stuff is generally pretty good at this level, we’re now getting better against the ball and I feel like that’s been a big difference for us. Yeah, excitement I think, obviously it’s a big game, we know what’s at stake and when these Champions League nights come around then, you’ve got to do everything you can to make sure you win them and have a positive experience and if we do that then we know what lies ahead.
